description: Up your style quotient with these classic Chuck Taylor &ldquo All Star Patch&rdquo high ankle shoes from converse. Team this comfy pair of jeans and comfort tees for a great casual look. Upper Canvas upper for durability and protection Lace-ups for snug Fit Metal eyelets for the laces for greater eye appeal and durability All Star ankle patch on one side and a cut out star patch on the other side of the ankle Rubber toe box for greater protection Midsole Cushioned insole for all day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with multi-directional pattern for greater grip and durability shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
